strategies.name: Follow 9:40
strategies.description: The 9:40 ET candle sets the day's directional bias; entry on two-candle confirmation, one trade per day, stop at session extreme, target at nearest Asia/London level >= 2R.

strategies.name: CCORB
strategies.description: Confirmed-close 5-minute opening-range breakout on MNQ. Structural stop at the opposite range extreme, breakeven shift at +0.5R, and winners ride a far target into the session close.

strategies.name: MBT TrendPilot
strategies.description: Long-only Donchian breakout on Micro Bitcoin futures, gated by a daily EMA trend filter and an ATR volatility floor, with an ATR trailing stop and a time-based exit.

strategies.name: CCORB Gold
strategies.description: Long-only opening-range breakout on Micro Gold. A conviction filter requires a real displacement candle on the break; winners ride an ATR trailing stop into the session close. The portfolio's first non-equity book, uncorrelated to the Nasdaq strategies.
